productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Ferrari Logo T-shirt
description: Style NoteStructured tee from puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this. Match the colour of the trousers with the jacket (keep it tonal) and pair this with a no-fuss style pair of sneakers.
